feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Big Time Sensuality
entry.summary:
Author: oceanicbliss (renx)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,987Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Watching your planet and supposedly everyone you love die...not so fun. Discovering your best friend and her baby cousin are alive on a boiling hot planet with an odd yellow sun...very confusing. Being forced to become friends with this bright red and green kid with what is easily the ugliest outfit you've ever seen...super duper annoying. This planet is so annoying.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: you should work on your flirting, i almost thought you liked me
entry.summary:
Author: twentytomidnight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,088Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: These men are just so good at flirting. It's amazing how good of an actor they are when it comes to putting the moves on you. Marvel/Reader, DC/Reader

entry.title: Underground
entry.summary:
Author: lulustars28

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,651Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: There is one name in Gotham's underground fighting circuit that strikes fear in all fighters: "Red Hood".Jason Todd is Roman Sionis golden fighter, who has made him millions. To Roman, Jason is nothing more than property and profit. The only reason Jason is Roman's lapdog is to win money to put food on the table for him and his younger brother, Tim. The money is never enough, but it keeps them alive. Walking away has never been an option. Because years ago, Jason made a promise to someone who never came back. A girl he met in stolen moments between worlds—someone who made him believe, briefly, that Gotham didn’t have to be loneliness and survival. Someone who promised she wouldn’t disappear like everyone else. Then she did. No goodbye. No explanation. No way to find her again. Jason buried the memory the only way he knew how: by assuming she had chosen to forget him. Now she’s back. After six years abroad, Roman Sionis’s daughter has finally returned to Gotham. Jason sees her as a traitor due to her broken promises. She sees him as another one of her father's thugs. But how long can their past stay buried under contempt, and how long can it be before old feelings begin to rise to the surface?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Over His Dead Body
entry.summary:
Author: Jamrockdrops

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,378Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 1,020

Summary: 15 years ago you met Jason Todd. 7 years ago he died. Finally, you've returned to Gotham ready to move on with your life and succeed in your new job at Wayne Tech. One day you get attacked and are saved by the infamous Red Hood, but he knows things about you he shouldn't and it seems like he's always watching you and always knows where you are.(No use of Y/N L/N, The Rape/non-consent tag is because it's mentioned (once) and the reader is attacked but it's stopped before anything gets too serious but I wanted to make sure no one accidentally got triggered)

entry.title: Baby
entry.summary:
Author: Brucewayneisavirgin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,914Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Jason and Reader have been together for three years and have never discussed whether they want children or not. How will they both cope when a mistake happens and they're faced with the possibility of an unplanned pregnancy?? (spoiler: they both freak the fuck out)

entry.title: Oil Stained Marginalia
entry.summary:
Author: laymorphosis

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,792Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 43

Summary: Jason Todd owns the mechanic shop down the street from a sleepy used bookstore that almost never sees a customer; which means the girl behind the counter has more than enough time on her hands to reorganize shelves, read and reread donated books too battered to put on the shelves, drink way too much coffee, and pretend she isn't watching the broad-shouldered mechanic who keeps making new excuses to come in during his lunch breaks.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: together, forever
entry.summary:
Author: peachmiffy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,992Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 17

Summary: You’re nine years old. You color with abandoned, half-dried dollar store Bic pens with ink that bubbles at the tip and occasionally bursts. Jason Todd is ten years old, and he sits beside you as he makes his way through his library stack of novels. This year, he’ll be turning eleven, which means he’ll move on to junior high and you’ll be left behind like a baby. He’s the best friend you’ve ever had. You’ve never known a life without him.    OR: After your mom dies, Catwoman takes you in. It changes you forever. You know what they say about cats and nine lives, don't you?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: everything we were [Jason Todd/Reader]
entry.summary:
Author: catzuuuu

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 602Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: After losing her parents in a car crash, [Name] is taken in under Bruce Wayne’s guardianship and slowly becomes part of the Wayne family and part of Jason Todd’s world. Jason is the first person in Gotham who feels real to her. And she is the only person who ever feels like home to him. Somewhere between late nights, training and stolen moments of normalcy, they fall in love. But Gotham doesn’t let things stay soft for long. When Jason dies, everything breaks. Grief pushes [Name] out of Wayne Manor and into the hands of the League of Assassins. Under Talia al Ghul, she is reshaped into something else entirely, Shadow, a controlled weapon moving through Gotham’s darkness. Years later, Red Hood returns to Gotham. And neither of them realize at first that they are chasing the ghost of the same past.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,463Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 121

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.summary:
Author: rockwithjoong

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,323Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 40

Summary: When Jason stumbles upon a shiny, unscathed car in the slums, he knows something's wrong. Inside is a fearful driver—paranoid and anxious from being stranded. Jason could ignore you, but how can he when he's a mechanic and knows how to fix your problem?
